'''thobawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:publick|publick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publick|publick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thobawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobawithi|thobawithi]] || [[word:thobawiji|thobawiji]] || [[word:thobawishi|thobawishi]] || [[word:thobawiki|thobawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobawuthuthu|thobawuthuthu]] || [[word:thobawujuju|thobawujuju]] || [[word:thobawushushu|thobawushushu]] || [[word:thobawukuku|thobawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawuthu|thobawuthu]] || [[word:thobawuju|thobawuju]] || [[word:thobawushu|thobawushu]] || [[word:thobawuku|thobawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawufthuf|thobawufthuf]] || [[word:thobawufjuf|thobawufjuf]] || [[word:thobawufshuf|thobawufshuf]] || [[word:thobawufkuf|thobawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobawethe|thobawethe]] || [[word:thobaweje|thobaweje]] || [[word:thobaweshe|thobaweshe]] || [[word:thobaweke|thobaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobawothotho|thobawothotho]] || [[word:thobawojojo|thobawojojo]] || [[word:thobawoshosho|thobawoshosho]] || [[word:thobawokoko|thobawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawotho|thobawotho]] || [[word:thobawojo|thobawojo]] || [[word:thobawosho|thobawosho]] || [[word:thobawoko|thobawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawofthof|thobawofthof]] || [[word:thobawofjof|thobawofjof]] || [[word:thobawofshof|thobawofshof]] || [[word:thobawofkof|thobawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfthĂŻf|thobawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfjĂŻf|thobawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfshĂŻf|thobawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfkĂŻf|thobawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thobawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thobawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thobawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thobawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfthĂŻf|thobawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfjĂŻf|thobawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfshĂŻf|thobawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfkĂŻf|thobawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfthĂŻf|thobawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfjĂŻf|thobawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfshĂŻf|thobawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobawĂŻfkĂŻf|thobawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobawĂŠthĂŠ|thobawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thobawĂŠjĂŠ|thobawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thobawĂŠshĂŠ|thobawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thobawĂŠkĂŠ|thobawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobawathatha|thobawathatha]] || [[word:thobawajaja|thobawajaja]] || [[word:thobawashasha|thobawashasha]] || [[word:thobawakaka|thobawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawatha|thobawatha]] || [[word:thobawaja|thobawaja]] || [[word:thobawasha|thobawasha]] || [[word:thobawaka|thobawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawafthaf|thobawafthaf]] || [[word:thobawafjaf|thobawafjaf]] || [[word:thobawafshaf|thobawafshaf]] || [[word:thobawafkaf|thobawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thobawasha|thobawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobawshĂ«sha|thobawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobawrosha|thobawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobawmusha|thobawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobawyasha|thobawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobawnkshĂ«sha|gothobawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobawnkrosha|gothobawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobawnkmusha|gothobawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobawnkyasha|gothobawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thobabawasha|thobabawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobabawshĂ«sha|thobabawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobabawrosha|thobabawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobabawmusha|thobabawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobabawyasha|thobabawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobabawnkshĂ«sha|gothobabawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobabawnkrosha|gothobabawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobabawnkmusha|gothobabawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobabawnkyasha|gothobabawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thebĂŠwasha|thebĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thebĂŠwshĂ«sha|thebĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thebĂŠwrosha|thebĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thebĂŠwmusha|thebĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thebĂŠwyasha|thebĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothebĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gothebĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothebĂŠwnkrosha|gothebĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothebĂŠwnkmusha|gothebĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothebĂŠwnkyasha|gothebĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thobfawasha|thobfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobfawshĂ«sha|thobfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobfawrosha|thobfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobfawmusha|thobfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobfawyasha|thobfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobfawnkshĂ«sha|gothobfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobfawnkrosha|gothobfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobfawnkmusha|gothobfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobfawnkyasha|gothobfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
